calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-120 SHY wiring validation (shy_enabled ablation)
items.notes: Diagnostic: validates enter_sws_mode() -> shy_normalise() wiring. 2 conditions x 3 seeds x 100 eps x 150 steps + 20 eval eps each. Supersedes EXQ-245 (non_contributory due to absent wiring).
